texto: There, an engaging tour guide told jokes and made witty quips in between sensationalized and brutal stories of inmates "getting what they deserved" because, as she put it, "if you gonna act like an animal, you gonna get treated like one." (We know, thanks to Goffman and pretty much every behavior study out there, that it often works the other way around.)
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Margee Kerr: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a educacao. O trecho “There, an engaging tour guide told jokes and made witty quips in between sensationalized and brut…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que educacao, behavior, behavioral-psychology pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de estudos e trabalho.
